data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes the number of choices users face to facilitate decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation bar and fewer top-level menu items.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes interactive elements to aid quick and easy access.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable buttons for primary actions.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Groups content into manageable chunks to align with short-term memory capacity.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes sections and headings to break down information.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Employs visual grouping to create a harmonious and intuitive layout.
data.technical_spec: Alignment, proximity, and similarity used for layout design.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Balances aesthetics and functionality to improve perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color schemes and visually appealing design elements.
